languages.text: "Капитан-интендант Дунавски!" {n}Батошски резко поворачивает голову и вам чудится лязг клыков, будто дикий зверь осаживает члена своей стаи. Женщина вытягивается по струнке и отдает честь.{/n}

"Captain-Quartermaster Dunawski!" {n}Batoshski snaps his head toward her, and for a moment you imagine you hear the gnashing of fangs, as if a wild beast disciplines a member of its pack. The woman snaps to attention and salutes.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Капитан-интендант Дунавски!" {n}Батошски резко поворачивает голову и вам чудится лязг клыков, будто дикий зверь осаживает члена своей стаи. Женщина вытягивается по струнке и отдает честь.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Captain-Quartermaster Dunawski!" {n}Batoshski's head snaps toward her, and for a moment you imagine you hear the clash of fangs, as if a wild beast disciplines a member of its pack. The woman snaps to attention and salutes.{/n}

"Captain-Quartermaster Dunawski!" {n}Batoshski snaps his head toward her, and for a moment you imagine you hear the gnashing of fangs, as if a wild beast disciplines a member of its pack. The woman snaps to attention and salutes.{/n}

"Captain-Quartermaster Dunawski!" {n}Batoshski almost snarls at her, his teeth bared like a wild animal. Dunawski straightens up and salutes before moving back one step. But only a moment later, her glittering eyes are once again fixed on you.{/n}

"Captain-Quartermaster Dunawski!" {n}Batoshski's head snaps toward her, and for a moment you imagine you hear the clash of fangs, as if a wild beast disciplines a member of its pack. The woman snaps to attention and salutes.{/n}

"Captain-Quartermaster Dunawski!" {n}Batoshski snaps his head toward her, and for a moment you imagine you hear the gnashing of fangs, as if a wild beast disciplines a member of its pack. The woman snaps to attention and salutes.{/n}

"Captain-Quartermaster Dunawski!" {n}Batoshski snaps his head toward her, and for a moment you imagine you hear the gnashing of fangs, as if a wild beast disciplines a member of its pack. The woman snaps to attention and salutes.{/n}

languages.text: 「艦長補佐・ダナウスキー！」{n}バトシュスキーはまるで野獣のように牙を剥き、彼女に怒鳴りつける。ダナウスキーは姿勢を正して敬礼し、一歩後退する。しかし、その直後、彼女の輝く瞳は再びあなたに向けられた。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Captain-Quartermaster Dunawski!" {n}Batoshski almost snarls at her, his teeth bared like a wild animal. Dunawski straightens up and salutes before moving back one step. But only a moment later, her glittering eyes are once again fixed on you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「艦長補佐・ダナウスキー！」{n}バトシュスキーはまるで野獣のように牙を剥き、彼女に怒鳴りつける。ダナウスキーは姿勢を正して敬礼し、一歩後退する。しかし、その直後、彼女の輝く瞳は再びあなたに向けられた。{/n}

languages.text: "Captain-Quartiermeisterin Dunawski!" {n}Batoshski richtet seinen Blick auf sie, und für einen Moment glaubst du das Knirschen von Reißzähnen zu hören, als würde ein wildes Tier ein Mitglied seines Rudels disziplinieren. Die Frau nimmt Haltung an und salutiert.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Captain-Quartermaster Dunawski!" {n}Batoshski snaps his head toward her, and for a moment you imagine you hear the gnashing of fangs, as if a wild beast disciplines a member of its pack. The woman snaps to attention and salutes.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Captain-Quartiermeisterin Dunawski!" {n}Batoshski richtet seinen Blick auf sie, und für einen Moment glaubst du das Knirschen von Reißzähnen zu hören, als würde ein wildes Tier ein Mitglied seines Rudels disziplinieren. Die Frau nimmt Haltung an und salutiert.{/n}

languages.text: « Capitaine-quartier-maître Dunawski ! » {n}Batoshski tourne brusquement la tête dans sa direction, et l'espace d'un instant, vous avez l'impression d'entendre un grincement de crocs, comme si une bête sauvage s'efforçait de discipliner un membre de sa meute. La femme se met aussitôt au garde-à-vous et se fend d'un salut militaire.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Captain-Quartermaster Dunawski!" {n}Batoshski snaps his head toward her, and for a moment you imagine you hear the gnashing of fangs, as if a wild beast disciplines a member of its pack. The woman snaps to attention and salutes.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Capitaine-quartier-maître Dunawski ! » {n}Batoshski tourne brusquement la tête dans sa direction, et l'espace d'un instant, vous avez l'impression d'entendre un grincement de crocs, comme si une bête sauvage s'efforçait de discipliner un membre de sa meute. La femme se met aussitôt au garde-à-vous et se fend d'un salut militaire.{/n}

languages.text: «¡Capitana intendente Dunawski!». {n}Batoshski gira la cabeza bruscamente hacia la mujer, y por un momento te parece oír el sonido de colmillos, como una bestia salvaje disciplinando a un miembro de su manada. La mujer se poner firme y se cuadra.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Captain-Quartermaster Dunawski!" {n}Batoshski snaps his head toward her, and for a moment you imagine you hear the gnashing of fangs, as if a wild beast disciplines a member of its pack. The woman snaps to attention and salutes.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «¡Capitana intendente Dunawski!». {n}Batoshski gira la cabeza bruscamente hacia la mujer, y por un momento te parece oír el sonido de colmillos, como una bestia salvaje disciplinando a un miembro de su manada. La mujer se poner firme y se cuadra.{/n}

languages.text: "Levazımcı Yüzbaşı Dunawski!" {n}Batoshski, başını hızla ona çeviriyor. Bir anlığına sanki vahşi bir hayvan sürüsünün bir mensubunu terbiye ediyormuş gibi diş gıcırdattığını duyduğunu sanıyorsun. Kadın anında hazır ola geçip selam veriyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Captain-Quartermaster Dunawski!" {n}Batoshski snaps his head toward her, and for a moment you imagine you hear the gnashing of fangs, as if a wild beast disciplines a member of its pack. The woman snaps to attention and salutes.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Levazımcı Yüzbaşı Dunawski!" {n}Batoshski, başını hızla ona çeviriyor. Bir anlığına sanki vahşi bir hayvan sürüsünün bir mensubunu terbiye ediyormuş gibi diş gıcırdattığını duyduğunu sanıyorsun. Kadın anında hazır ola geçip selam veriyor.{/n}

languages.text: “军需官上尉杜纳芙斯卡！”{n}巴托什斯基猛地将头转向她，那一瞬间，你仿佛听见了獠牙的摩擦声，就像一头野兽在管教它的族群成员。那女人立刻立正敬礼。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Captain-Quartermaster Dunawski!" {n}Batoshski snaps his head toward her, and for a moment you imagine you hear the gnashing of fangs, as if a wild beast disciplines a member of its pack. The woman snaps to attention and salutes.{/n}
